title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 409.114 - Duties and powers of commissioner of securities
text:
409.114.  Duties and powers of commissioner of securities. — Sections 409.108 to 409.114 shall be administered by the commissioner of securities.  The commissioner of securities is hereby empowered to promulgate, alter, amend or revoke rules and regulations pursuant to section 409.6-605 as necessary to carry out the purposes of sections 409.108 to 409.114.
(L. 2004 H.B. 1617)
